case_title: ALI AL AL-IMAM VS. MERCEDES RAMOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2014 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO OCT-06-2014 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "CONTINUED HEARING DATE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY ARABIC INTERPRETER---MARIE THERESE SABBAH. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ALFREDO MEZA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DEBORAH DANILOFF. FILED BY AL-IMAM, ALI AL RAMOS, MERCEDES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-13-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ALFREDO MEZA. ARABIC INTERPRETER ORDERED FOR THE PLAINTIFF FOR TODAYS HEARING; NO INTERPRETER SHOWED UP AND THE CASE IS CONTINUED TO 11/13/14 FOR ARABIC INTERPRETER. ARABIC INTERPRETER ORDERED FOR THE NEXT HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AL-IMAM, ALI AL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAMOS, MERCEDES JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,600.00 FILED BY AL-IMAM, ALI AL AS TO DEFENDANT RAMOS, MERCEDES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2014 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AL-IMAM, ALI AL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
